'''''Starship Battles''''' is a space-based game branded under [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] line. It was released in [[November]] [[2006]].

==Gameplay==
The Starship Battles Starter Set contains:
*8 randomized starship miniatures
*2 exclusive miniatures: the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] and the [[Viscount (Viscount-class)|''Viscount'']]
*Full-color game stat cards
*Fully illustrated two-sided battle map (space outside [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]/[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]])
*20-sided dice
*Rulebook
*2 Fleet Commander cards
*Damage and Command counters

Each booster pack contains:
*7 randomized starship miniatures
*Full-color game stat cards

{{Game-stub}}

==Contents==
[[FIle:ExecutorBattle-SWM.jpg|thumb|250px|Starter Set cover art]]
''Rarity denoted as follows: Common (C), Uncommon (U), Rare (R)''

''Starships are listed in set order''

<nowiki />*The ''Viscount'' and ''Executor'' pieces are the only pieces that are consistently included in the starter sets.
